message:
Fix Tantivy workspace field type for exact-match filtering

Changes workspace field from TEXT to STRING in Tantivy schema, enabling exact
path matching for workspace filters instead of tokenized text search. Fixes
workspace filter behavior where "/ws/foo" would incorrectly match "/ws/foobar".

Change:

```rust
// Before:
schema_builder.add_text_field("workspace", TEXT | STORED);

// After:
schema_builder.add_text_field("workspace", STRING | STORED);
```

Field type semantics:

**TEXT**:
- Tokenized and analyzed for full-text search
- Example: "/ws/my-project" → tokens ["ws", "my", "project"]
- Query "project" matches this document
- Query "/ws/my" matches (partial token match)
- Use case: Content fields where substring matching desired

**STRING**:
- Indexed as single atomic term (no tokenization)
- Example: "/ws/my-project" → single term "/ws/my-project"
- Query "/ws/my-project" matches (exact)
- Query "/ws/my" does NOT match (not same term)
- Use case: IDs, paths, enum values where exact match required

Why this matters for workspace filtering:

Workspace paths are file system paths like:
- /home/user/projects/backend
- /Users/alice/workspace/frontend
- C:\dev\project

These should filter exactly, not by substring:
- Filter: workspace="/home/user/projects/backend"
- Should match: only documents with exact path
- Should NOT match: /home/user/projects/backend-v2 (different project)

With TEXT field (before):
```rust
filters.workspaces.insert("/ws/foo".into());
// Tantivy tokenizes to ["ws", "foo"]
// Matches: /ws/foo, /ws/foobar, /other/ws/foo (wrong!)
```

With STRING field (after):
```rust
filters.workspaces.insert("/ws/foo".into());
// Tantivy indexes as single term "/ws/foo"
// Matches: only /ws/foo (correct!)
```

Real-world example:

User has two projects:
- /home/alice/coding-agent-search (main project)
- /home/alice/coding-agent-search-fork (experimental fork)

User wants to search only main project:
```rust
filters.workspaces.insert("/home/alice/coding-agent-search".into());
```

Before (TEXT):
- Returns results from BOTH projects
- Tokenization matches "coding", "agent", "search" in both paths
- User confused: "I filtered to main project, why do I see fork results?"

After (STRING):
- Returns results only from main project
- Exact path match required
- User sees only main project results ✓

Query implementation:

In SearchClient::search_tantivy:
```rust
for ws in &filters.workspaces {
    let term = Term::from_field_text(fields.workspace, ws);
    workspace_query.add_clause(Occur::Should, Box::new(TermQuery::new(term, ...)));
}
```

With STRING field:
- Term::from_field_text creates single term from full path
- TermQuery matches exact term
- Boolean OR combines multiple workspace filters

Backward compatibility:

This change requires reindexing:
- Existing indexes have workspace as TEXT field
- New code expects workspace as STRING field
- Users must run: `coding-agent-search index --full`

Why breaking change acceptable:
- Project still in development (pre-1.0)
- --full reindex is fast (seconds for typical codebases)
- Correctness fix more important than backward compat
- README already documents --full for first run

Migration path:

For users with existing index:
1. Pull latest code
2. Run `coding-agent-search index --full`
3. Existing data reindexed with correct schema
4. Workspace filters now work correctly

Index version detection (future):
Could add schema version to Tantivy meta.json:
```json
{
  "schema_version": 2,
  "workspace_field_type": "string"
}
```

Then detect mismatched schema and force reindex automatically.
Not implemented in this commit (would complicate schema evolution).

Testing impact:

Test that workspace filtering works correctly (tests/search/query.rs):
```rust
let mut filters = SearchFilters::default();
filters.workspaces.insert("/ws/b".into());
let hits = client.search("needle", filters, 10, 0)?;
assert_eq!(hits[0].workspace, "/ws/b");
// Before: might also return "/ws/backend" (substring match)
// After: only returns exact "/ws/b" ✓
```

Other field types:

Fields with STRING type (exact match):
- workspace: file paths
- source_path: file paths (conversation source)

Fields with TEXT type (full-text):
- content: message content (want tokenization)
- title: conversation titles (want tokenization)
- agent: agent names (could be STRING, but TEXT allows fuzzy search)

Fields with other types:
- created_at: i64 (numeric range queries)
- msg_idx: u64 (numeric queries)

This field type selection follows Tantivy best practices for path filtering.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
